item.title: Nudge 1.3.0
item.description:
Nudge 1.3.0 — Fresh start

  • Slim minimised view: only the current task's countdown / progress and the next task. Headers, action pills, dots row, and quote moved off the minimised HUD.
  • 20-20-20 eye-break and water-reminder overlays now fit the slim panel — no more sudden expansion.
  • Backlog: new "Clear all" pill in the top right (with confirm) — for nuking the loose-ends list in one tap.
  • Removed the daily-intention auto-prompt that fired on every first expand.
  • Ships with an empty schedule — set up your week from More → Edit schedule.
  • Auto-update feed migrated to nudge.focusdragon.app.

item.title: Nudge 1.2.1
item.description:
Nudge 1.2.1

  • Apple traffic lights are now built into the minimized HUD — red hides the app, yellow tucks it away
  • Expand chevron moved to the bottom-right of the HUD to clear room for the traffic lights
  • Sparkle update check tightened to every 5 minutes
